News and events

Keep up-to-date with the very latest news and developments for the University of Hull, and find out more about our upcoming events.

Top story

£48 million investment for world-leading Wound Innovation Institute

The University of Hull is establishing a £48m internationally leading translational wound research institute in East Yorkshire. 

Find out more
Featured Event

Undergraduate Open Day

Whoever you are, wherever you’re from and wherever you want to go in life, we’d love to meet you.

Experience Hull on an Open Day and see what makes our campus feel like home. Explore our green, walkable campus, meet lecturers and students, and discover how one day here could shape your future.

Find out more

Cottingham Road, Hull, HU6 7RX, United Kingdom

+44 (0)1482 346311
